intent: We are building a Mac Consensus Dev Agent that will use consensus AI to develop high quality software. Use all the documents in the local repo to determine the architecture.
scope_statement:
Build the complete Crafted Dev Agent — a native macOS two-process AI coding agent consisting of a Swift/SwiftUI shell (UI, Touch ID auth, Keychain, XPC channel, process management) and a Python 3.12 backend (consensus engine with Claude+GPT-4o parallel generation, build pipeline with confidence-gated scope through operator-gated PR merge, GitHub integration, document store with FAISS vector retrieval, multi-agent coordination ledger, holistic code review, TRD development workflow with FOUNDER/ENGINEER/CONSULTANT modes, self-healing observability loop, cross-run learning via BuildMemory and BuildRules, and Mac CI runner infrastructure). The system is fully specified across 16 TRDs plus supporting documents, with five identified gaps (TRD-18 Crafted Connect SDK, deployment pipeline, Figma MCP integration, EmailNotifier contract, and WebhookReceiver details) to be resolved during PRD decomposition as the operator has directed.

Clarifications:
  - resolve as part of the PRD process with best practices
  - resolve as part of the PRD process with best practices
  - resolve as part of the PRD process with best practices
  - resolve as part of the PRD process with best practices
  - resolve as part of the PRD process with best practices

Operator on 'The 16 TRDs specify a large system — should the PRD decompos':
build the PRDs in the order that allows for maximum code efficiency

Operator on 'TRD-17 (Self-Healing) references runtime telemetry and healt':
included in the build

Operator on 'TRD-7 v2.0 CONSULTANT mode (§21) includes client summary .do':
included in the build

Operator on 'TRD-8 v3.0 Health Dashboard and Figma pipeline UI are signif':
include them in the build

prd_plan.title: Platform Foundations, Canonical Contracts, and Gap Resolution
Security Architecture and Safety Enforcement Layer
Backend Runtime, Startup Handshake, XPC Server, and Command Routing
Recovery, Thread State, Checkpointing, and Cross-Run Learning
Document Store, Parsing, Embeddings, Retrieval, and Context Safety
GitHub Integration Core, Webhooks, CI Polling, and Repository Bootstrap
Consensus Engine and Provider Orchestration
Build Pipeline Orchestrator, Scope Gate, PR Planning, and Execution Routing
Code Quality Engine: Self-Correction, Lint Gate, and Fix Loop
Multi-Agent Coordination Ledger and Collaboration Surfaces
Holistic Code Review Workflow and Fix PR Automation
TRD Development Workflow with FOUNDER, ENGINEER, and CONSULTANT Modes
Swift Shell Core: App Structure, Auth, Keychain, and Process Management
Swift-Python XPC Bridge and Shell-Backend Event Integration
SwiftUI Product UX: Build Stream, TRD UX, Health Dashboard, and Remediation Views
Document Import, Sketch Input, Figma Integration, and Figma MCP Pipeline
Crafted Connect SDK, Target Registry, Runtime Telemetry, and In-App Health Reporting
Self-Healing Observability, Detection, Diagnosis, Remediation, and Learning Loop
Notifications, EmailNotifier, Operator Alerts, and Native macOS Attention Surfaces
Mac CI Runner, Swift Validation Pipeline, Signing, Notarization, and Release Deployment
Comprehensive Testing, Regression Enforcement, and Release Validation
